name: db_subnet_group_arn
description: The ARN of the db subnet group

name: enhanced_monitoring_iam_role_arn
description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) specifying the monitoring role

name: db_instance_address
description: The address of the RDS instance

name: db_instance_engine_version_actual
description: The running version of the database

name: db_instance_domain_ou
description: The self managed Active Directory organizational unit for your DB instance to join

name: db_instance_master_user_secret_arn
description: The ARN of the master user secret (Only available when manage_master_user_password is set to true)

name: db_instance_endpoint
description: The connection endpoint

name: db_instance_domain
description: The ID of the Directory Service Active Directory domain the instance is joined to

name: db_instance_port
description: The database port

name: db_instance_upgrade_rollout_order
description: Order in which the instances are upgraded (first, second, last)

name: db_parameter_group_id
description: The db parameter group id

name: db_instance_status
description: The RDS instance status

name: db_instance_username
description: The master username for the database

name: db_instance_arn
description: The ARN of the RDS instance

name: db_instance_domain_auth_secret_arn
description: The ARN for the Secrets Manager secret with the self managed Active Directory credentials for the user joining the domain

name: db_instance_domain_iam_role_name
description: The name of the IAM role to be used when making API calls to the Directory Service

name: db_option_group_id
description: The db option group id

name: db_option_group_arn
description: The ARN of the db option group

name: db_instance_cloudwatch_log_groups
description: Map of CloudWatch log groups created and their attributes

name: enhanced_monitoring_iam_role_name
description: The name of the monitoring role

name: db_listener_endpoint
description: Specifies the listener connection endpoint for SQL Server Always On

name: db_instance_identifier
description: The RDS instance identifier

name: db_instance_domain_dns_ips
description: The IPv4 DNS IP addresses of your primary and secondary self managed Active Directory domain controllers

name: db_instance_availability_zone
description: The availability zone of the RDS instance

name: db_instance_resource_id
description: The RDS Resource ID of this instance

name: db_instance_ca_cert_identifier
description: Specifies the identifier of the CA certificate for the DB instance

name: db_instance_engine
description: The database engine

name: db_subnet_group_id
description: The db subnet group name

name: db_instance_secretsmanager_secret_rotation_enabled
description: Specifies whether automatic rotation is enabled for the secret

name: db_instance_hosted_zone_id
description: The canonical hosted zone ID of the DB instance (to be used in a Route 53 Alias record)

name: db_instance_name
description: The database name

name: db_instance_domain_fqdn
description: The fully qualified domain name (FQDN) of an self managed Active Directory domain

name: db_parameter_group_arn
description: The ARN of the db parameter group

name: db_instance_role_associations
description: A map of DB Instance Identifiers and IAM Role ARNs separated by a comma
